scripts.dev: npm run build -w packages/shared && concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.test: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.audit:bn-wallets: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run audit:bn-wallets -w apps/api --
